---
title: "Past Years"
format: html
editor: visual
lightbox: true
---

Picture from last year!

![Observation event with the Conservation Biology class at NMU](images/2025/2025_images/Copy%20of%20Marquette_Michigan_USA_OwenVanAntwerpen.JPG){fig-align="center" width="160"}

![Observation event at the Presque Isle Bog](images/2025/2025_images/bog.JPG){fig-align="center" width="160"}

![Observation event at Harlow Lake with the Marquette County Conservation District](images/2025/2025_images/macro.JPG){fig-align="center" width="160"}

```{r}
#| label: inat_barchart
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)

mqt <- read_csv("graphs/mqt_inat.csv") |>
  filter(quality_grade != "casual") |>
   group_by(iconic_taxon_name) |> 
  summarise(mqt_count = n()) |>
  na.omit() |>
  arrange(desc(mqt_count)) #add that I made it and got data from iNat + titles & captions

ggplot(mqt, aes(x = reorder(iconic_taxon_name, -mqt_count), y = mqt_count, fill = iconic_taxon_name)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Counts of Taxa",
    x = "Taxon",
    y = "Count",
    caption = "Figure created by Mattea Muscat using data from iNaturalist"
  ) + 
  coord_flip()

```

```{r}

#| label: interactive_map
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false


library(tidyverse)
library(basemaps)
library(terra)
library(terra)
library(maptiles)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggplot2)
library(tmap)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(mapview)
library(tmap)

mqt <- read.csv('graphs/mqt_inat.csv')

obs_points <- vect(mqt, geom = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = "EPSG:4326")
plot(obs_points)

osm_tiles <- get_tiles(obs_points, provider = "OpenStreetMap") # grabs the open street map basemap, there's other options, too. 

tmap_mode("view") 

m <- tm_shape(obs_points) +
  tm_dots(fill = "iconic_taxon_name", size = 0.75) +
  tm_basemap(server = "Esri.WorldTopoMap")

m

```
